ofsted.note: Outstanding status held since first report in 2004. Four consecutive Outstanding ratings.
strengths: Exemplary student attendance, behaviour and attitudes to learning
A-level results significantly exceed England average (64% A*-B vs 47% national)
18 Oxbridge places in 2024
Expertly designed tutorial programme
Rich and comprehensive enrichment programme with 100+ activities
Number 1 Sixth Form College in the North of England, top 10 nationally
Students feel safe due to care and expertise of staff

student_room.note: Active discussions on The Student Room comparing Greenhead favorably for A-level study

sentiment_summary.competitive_position: Premium sixth form provider - direct competitor for academic A-level students

ofsted.note: Downgraded from Outstanding to Good in 2024
strengths: Students prepared very well for future careers
Effective safeguarding arrangements
Students understand healthy relationships and safety strategies
Wide range of enrichment activities (sports, astronomy, meditation)

student_room.note: Recommended for students wanting vocational/BTEC subjects alongside A-levels. Only college in West Yorkshire offering mixed A Level and BTEC qualifications.

sentiment_summary.competitive_position: Competitor for 16-18 students wanting mixed academic/vocational pathways

strengths: Achievement rates for 16-19 study programmes have risen over three years
Very large proportion of learners achieve their qualifications
Successful progression to positive destinations linked to qualifications and career aspirations
Outstanding leadership and management

sentiment_summary.competitive_position: Direct FE competitor in neighbouring borough, similar profile to Kirklees College

ofsted.note: Good across all aspects of provision
strengths: Leaders and managers are highly ambitious for learners
Strong support for learners with SEND and from disadvantaged backgrounds
Leaders create opportunities for learners to broaden experiences
Calm and purposeful learning environment
Best large training provider in West Yorkshire for second year
Bucking national trend with exceptional GCSE results
areas_for_improvement: Small minority affected by low-level disruption and poor punctuality

key_strengths: Best large FE in West Yorkshire
sentiment_summary.competitive_position: Large FE competitor in neighbouring city, similar offering but larger scale

kirklees_differentiators: Strong apprenticeship provision (8.9/10 on RateMyApprenticeship, top 5 nationally)
Specialist training facilities (mock hospital ward, air cabin, kitchens, salons)
areas_where_competitors_lead: Greenhead College: Academic excellence, Outstanding Ofsted, Oxbridge pipeline
Bradford College: Best large FE in West Yorkshire, GCSE trend-bucking results
Calderdale College: Outstanding leadership and management
Huddersfield New College: Mixed A Level/BTEC offering
